import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import api from '../api/client'; import './Home.css'; const DEFAULT_SKILLS = [ { icon: '⚡', label: 'JavaScript / TS' }, { icon: '⚛', label: 'React & Next.js' }, { icon: '🤖', label: 'AI Prompting' }, { icon: '🔧', label: 'Node.js & NoSQL' }, { icon: '🎨', label: 'Tailwind CSS' }, { icon: '☁️', label: 'AWS & Vercel' }, { icon: '✏️', label: 'UI/UX Design' }, { icon: '🧠', label: 'LLM Integration' }, ]; const BACKEND = process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL || 'http://localhost:5000'; const Home = () => { const [about, setAbout] = useState(null); const [featured, setFeatured] = useState([]); const [certs, setCerts] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { api.get('/about').then(r => setAbout(r.data.data)).catch(() => {}); api.get('/projects').then(r => { setFeatured(r.data.data.filter(p => p.featured).slice(0, 2)); }).catch(() => {}); api.get('/certifications').then(r => { setCerts(r.data.data); }).catch(() => {}); }, []); return (
